title: Add "create" and "remove" events for secrets.
body:
This PR adds the "secret" Event type and emits it with "create" and "remove" statuses when Secret is created or removed.

This can be used for example by podman interfaces to view and manage secrets.

Fixes: #24030

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
The podman-events command now supports the "secret" type with "create" and "remove" statuses.
```

comments.body: Please be aware this is my first contribution to the project and I do not have big experience with go - I'm definitely open to any suggestion you have :-).

I so far cannot reproduce the failed tests locally on my Fedora machine and they seem to be unrelated to my change, but I will keep digging :-).

Is there a way to restart them to find out if it's some temporary infra failure?

All checkpoint failures in integration should be regarded as flakes. Restarted.
I haven't seen the failure in the system tests before, but as it is a networking test it could be a flake? Restarted just in case
@mheon Can you restart the failed task? Looks like I don't have permission.
